mapper.select: /* selectDeliveryRouteList */ SELECT delivery_route_id, delivery_route_nm, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn FROM delivery_route WHERE del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY delivery_route_id DESC
/* selectDeliveryRouteCodeList */ SELECT MIN(delivery_route_id) as code_val, delivery_route_nm as code_nm FROM delivery_route WHERE del_yn = 'N' GROUP BY delivery_route_nm ORDER BY code_nm
mapper.insert: /* insertDeliveryRoute */ INSERT INTO delivery_route ( delivery_route_nm, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{param.deliveryRouteNm}, #{memberInfo.memberId}, now(), #{memberInfo.memberId}, now(), 'N' )
mapper.update: /* updateDeliveryRoute */ UPDATE delivery_route SET delivery_route_nm = #{param.deliveryRouteNm}, chg_id = #{memberInfo.memberId}, chg_dt = now() WHERE delivery_route_id = #{param.deliveryRouteId}
UPDATE delivery_route SET del_yn = 'Y', chg_id = #{memberInfo.memberId}, chg_dt = now() WHERE delivery_route_id = #{param.deliveryRouteId}
mapper.select: /* selectDeliveryRouteByCompany */ SELECT delivery_route_id, company_id, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn FROM company_delivery_route WHERE delivery_route_id = #{deliveryRouteId} AND company_id = #{companyId}

/* selectCompanyDeliveryRouteList */ SELECT cdr.delivery_route_id, cdr.company_id, co.company_nm, co.address, co.tel_no, co.manager_tel_no, cdr.reg_id, cdr.reg_dt, cdr.chg_id, cdr.chg_dt, cdr.del_yn FROM company_delivery_route cdr INNER JOIN company co ON co.company_id = cdr.company_id WHERE cdr.delivery_route_id = #{deliveryRouteId} AND cdr.del_yn = 'N'
AND cdr.company_id = #{companyId}
mapper.insert: /* insertCompanyAndDeliberyRoute */ INSERT INTO company_delivery_route( delivery_route_id, delivery_route_cd, company_id, reg_id, chg_id, del_yn ) VALUES( #{param.deliveryRouteId}, #{param.deliveryRouteCd}, #{param.companyId}, #{memberInfo.memberId}, #{memberInfo.memberId}, 'N' )
mapper.delete: /* deleteCompanyAndDeliveryRouteById */ DELETE FROM company_delivery_route WHERE company_id = #{companyId}
